headline: Could Fortive’s (FTV) SmartTrace Launch Reveal a Deeper Bet on Connected Infrastructure Software?
summary: In recent days, Fortive subsidiary Fluke Corporation launched the SmartTrace 2082 Series of Underground Locators, which integrates with ProStar’s PointMan platform to enable real-time digital documentation of underground utilities and assets, aiming to improve field accuracy, safety, and infrastructure protection. This pairing of advanced locating hardware with a specialized mapping app highlights Fortive’s push toward more connected, software-enhanced tools that can deepen its role in...
